description: Pipeline completion tracker — the SINGLE source of truth for what data pipeline work has been completed. Check THIS before executing any pipeline task.

output.d1_qwav_scan: 193 arXiv papers with full metadata (arxiv_id, title, authors, abstract, category, relevance)

verification_commands: wrangler d1 execute qwav-scan --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM papers"
wrangler d1 execute qnfo-graph --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nodes"

verification_policy: BEFORE executing ANY data pipeline task, check this file. If status is 'complete', the task has been done. Do NOT re-execute without explicit user confirmation.
